title: Iran war unwinds a year of investor bets on Trump’s tariffs
description: Global stocks, which had rallied on the back of the artificial intelligence boom and falling interest rates, have lost about $14 trillion in value since the conflict began, as risk appetite evaporated
content:

title: Oracle Financial Services shares climb nearly 4% amid reports of 12,000 layoffs in India
description: The stock gained Rs 265 during the session, reflecting investor optimism despite concerns around restructuring linked to rising investments in artificial intelligence
content:
